---
title: ""
page-layout: full

format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
    anchor-sections: false
    body-classes: about-page
---

::: columns

::: {.column .profile-card}

![](images/portrait_2.jpg){fig-align="center"}

:::


::: {.column .bio-card}

## Dr. Mellissa Linton-Villafranco

A scholar, researcher, and educator whose work examines public policy and interdisciplinary approaches to improving communities. Her research bridges rigorous scholarship with public impact through data-driven inquiry, teaching, mentorship, and collaborative partnerships.

:::

:::
